documents.title: Aries / 白羊座
documents.text: Aries is a cardinal fire sign associated with initiative, courage, directness, and fast action. In reflective forecasting, Aries context suggests starting before everything feels perfect, but watching impatience.

documents.title: Taurus / 金牛座
documents.text: Taurus is a fixed earth sign associated with stability, comfort, material resources, patience, and sensory grounding. Forecasts often frame Taurus themes as slow progress, practical value, and resistance to unnecessary change.

documents.title: Gemini / 双子座
documents.text: Gemini is a mutable air sign associated with curiosity, communication, multiple perspectives, learning, and social movement. A Gemini emphasis favors asking better questions and comparing options before committing.

documents.title: Cancer / 巨蟹座
documents.text: Cancer is a cardinal water sign linked with emotional safety, home, memory, family, and protective instincts. Forecasts often use Cancer context for belonging, care, and boundaries around emotional labor.

documents.title: Leo / 狮子座
documents.text: Leo is a fixed fire sign associated with visibility, pride, creativity, generosity, leadership, and performance. Leo context supports confident self-expression while checking whether attention is being used with warmth.

documents.title: Virgo / 处女座
documents.text: Virgo is a mutable earth sign associated with analysis, routines, service, craft, health habits, and practical improvement. Virgo forecasts emphasize making systems clearer rather than chasing perfection.

documents.title: Libra / 天秤座
documents.text: Libra is a cardinal air sign associated with balance, aesthetics, negotiation, fairness, and partnership. Libra context supports relationship reflection, but warns against over-adjusting to keep peace.

documents.title: Scorpio / 天蝎座
documents.text: Scorpio is a fixed water sign linked with intensity, trust, transformation, secrecy, and emotional depth. Scorpio readings often focus on honest motives, release, and psychological insight.

documents.title: Sagittarius / 射手座
documents.text: Sagittarius is a mutable fire sign associated with exploration, belief, travel, philosophy, optimism, and blunt truth. Sagittarius context favors widening the horizon while keeping promises realistic.

documents.title: Capricorn / 摩羯座
documents.text: Capricorn is a cardinal earth sign associated with discipline, ambition, time, structure, responsibility, and public achievement. Capricorn readings emphasize sustainable plans and respect for limits.

documents.title: Aquarius / 水瓶座
documents.text: Aquarius is a fixed air sign associated with systems, innovation, groups, independence, ideals, and future-facing thinking. Aquarius context asks how personal choices affect a wider network.

documents.title: Pisces / 双鱼座
documents.text: Pisces is a mutable water sign associated with imagination, spirituality, empathy, dreams, and porous boundaries. Pisces context is useful for creative reflection, but needs grounding when emotions blur facts.

documents.title: Sun Symbolism
documents.text: The Sun symbolizes identity, vitality, purpose, and the way a person wants to be recognized. In agent responses, Sun sign memory helps personalize tone and motivational advice.

documents.title: Moon Symbolism
documents.text: The Moon symbolizes emotional needs, habits, memory, family patterns, and the instinctive response to stress. Moon information is especially relevant for questions about feelings, comfort, and private life.

documents.title: Mercury Symbolism
documents.text: Mercury symbolizes communication, learning, analysis, trade, writing, and the nervous system. Mercury context is useful for study plans, interviews, messages, and misunderstandings.

documents.title: Venus Symbolism
documents.text: Venus symbolizes affection, attraction, aesthetics, pleasure, money, and values. Venus context is relevant for relationship questions, design choices, and what feels worth investing in.

documents.title: Mars Symbolism
documents.text: Mars symbolizes action, assertion, desire, conflict, and physical energy. Mars context helps an agent discuss motivation, courage, anger, and when to act directly.

documents.title: Jupiter Symbolism
documents.text: Jupiter symbolizes growth, luck, teaching, belief, generosity, and expansion. Jupiter context supports opportunity framing but should include the risk of overpromising.

documents.title: Saturn Symbolism
documents.text: Saturn symbolizes limits, discipline, responsibility, delay, mastery, and long-term consequences. Saturn context is important for career, exams, deadlines, and serious commitments.

documents.title: New Moon Meaning
documents.text: A New Moon is commonly interpreted as a beginning, reset, or intention-setting period. In a reflective agent, it can suggest planning a small experiment instead of demanding instant results.

documents.title: Full Moon Meaning
documents.text: A Full Moon is often interpreted as a culmination, reveal, or emotional high point. In advice, it can indicate reviewing outcomes, naming feelings clearly, and avoiding impulsive drama.

documents.title: Mercury Retrograde as Retrieval Context
documents.text: Mercury retrograde is commonly used as a symbolic period for reviewing messages, revising plans, backing up files, and slowing assumptions. It should not be treated as a deterministic cause of failure.

documents.title: Tenth House: Career and Public Role
documents.text: The tenth house represents career, public role, reputation, authority, and long-term direction. It is the strongest house context for questions about work, applications, exams, and achievement.

documents.title: Seventh House: Partnership
documents.text: The seventh house represents one-to-one partnership, negotiation, contracts, and the mirror of other people. It is useful for love, friendship conflict, clients, and collaboration questions.

documents.title: Ethical Forecasting Boundary
documents.text: Astrology forecasts should be framed as reflective entertainment and narrative coaching, not medical, legal, financial, or scientific prediction. The agent should encourage user agency and avoid fatalistic claims.

documents.title: IR-Augmented Forecasting Pattern
documents.text: An IR-augmented agent first retrieves user memory, domain knowledge, and time-specific context, then synthesizes an answer. This makes the response more grounded, explainable, and extensible than direct generation.

documents.title: BaZi / 八字基础
documents.text: 八字，也叫四柱，是一种中国传统命理框架，通常使用出生年、月、日、时来形成四组天干地支。In this project, BaZi is used as reflective cultural knowledge for personalization, not as deterministic prediction.

documents.title: Five Elements / 五行
documents.text: 五行包括木、火、土、金、水。A reflective reading may treat them as symbolic lenses: Wood for growth, Fire for visibility, Earth for stability, Metal for structure, and Water for learning and adaptation.

documents.title: Ten Heavenly Stems / 十天干
documents.text: 十天干是甲、乙、丙、丁、戊、己、庚、辛、壬、癸。They are often mapped to yin-yang and five-element qualities, giving a compact vocabulary for personality, timing, and situational analysis.

documents.title: Twelve Earthly Branches / 十二地支
documents.text: 十二地支是子、丑、寅、卯、辰、巳、午、未、申、酉、戌、亥。They connect traditional time divisions, zodiac animals, seasons, and hidden elements.

documents.title: Day Master / 日主
documents.text: 日主通常指日柱的天干，被视为八字分析中代表自我立场的核心符号。For this agent, day master information can personalize tone, but should be explained as symbolic interpretation.

documents.title: Useful Element / 用神
documents.text: 用神是八字分析中用于讨论结构平衡的概念，常被解释为对命局有支持作用的元素。In this project, it is treated as a retrieval concept for reflective advice, not a fixed fate rule.

documents.title: Combining Astrology and BaZi as IR Context / 中西合参检索
documents.text: The agent can combine Western astrology and BaZi by retrieving both knowledge types, then clearly labeling them as different symbolic systems. This demonstrates multi-source information retrieval and context fusion.

documents.title: BaZi Ethical Boundary / 八字伦理边界
documents.text: 八字内容应被表达为文化知识、反思工具或娱乐性叙事，而不是医学、法律、金融决定，也不应宣称可以确定命运。The agent should preserve user agency and avoid fatalistic advice.
